_comment: Drop this into .claude/settings.json (project) or ~/.claude/settings.json (user) to auto-run kit security checks after AI edits. Merge with existing settings if any.

hooks.command: node $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/sandstream-kit/dist/cli.js check --category security --json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'process.stdin.resume();let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const fail=j.checks.filter(c=>c.status==="fail");if(fail.length){console.error("::kit:: "+fail.length+" security check(s) failed:");fail.forEach(f=>console.error("  - "+f.name+": "+f.detail));process.exit(2)}}catch(e){}})'
node $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/sandstream-kit/dist/cli.js triage skill sentinel 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'TRIAGE PASSED' || true
